name: Cinnamon Swirl Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake ingredients in a large bowl until the batter is stiff.
2. Grease and flour a baking pan.
3. Pour half of the batter into the pan and sprinkle with half of the sugar mixture.
4. Swirl the batter and remaining sugar mixture evenly over the top.
5. Layer with the remaining batter and sprinkle with the rest of the sugar mixture.
6. Swirl again to combine.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
The cake should be very brown before it is fully cooked. To keep it moist, store it tightly covered after cooling.
